AxReportDesign.Name: PrecisionDesign
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>82c0246b-8900-4546-b88c-b17c3e33d677</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETG_CustOpeningBalanceDP"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AsOnDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETG_CustOpeningBalanceDP_AsOnDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="CustomerAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!CustomerAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETG_CustOpeningBalanceDP.ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="BOLNumber"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.BOLNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Commodity"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.Commodity</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Currency"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.Currency</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CustCode"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.CustCode</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CustName"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.CustName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceNumber"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.InvoiceNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LocalCurrencyCredit"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.LocalCurrencyCredit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LocalCurrencyDebit"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.LocalCurrencyDebit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Quantity"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.Quantity</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TransactionCurrencyCredit"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.TransactionCurrencyCredit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TransactionCurrencyDebit"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.TransactionCurrencyDebit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TransactionDate"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.TransactionDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TransactionText"> <DataField>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceTmp.1.TransactionText</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceDP</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox_0"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <CanShrink>true</CanShrink> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Customer Account : </Value> <Style> <FontStyle>Normal</FontStyle> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> <TextDecoration>None</TextDecoration> </Style> </TextRun> <TextRun> <Value>=Parameters!CustomerAccount.Value</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <TextDecoration>None</TextDecoration> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <Height>0.17335in</Height> <Width>6in</Width> <DataElementName>ETG_CustOpeningBalanceDP0</DataElementName> <Style> <TopBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </TopBorder> <BottomBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </BottomBorder> <LeftBorder> <Color>Black</Color>
